title: Avoid Using Classes from "sun.*" Packages
description: The classes in the "sun.*" packages are not part of the official Java API and are meant for internal use only in Oracle JDK. They lack proper documentation and support, and their usage can lead to unpredictable behavior or compatibility issues across different Java implementations or versions.
recommendation: Replace usage of "sun.*" package classes with standard Java API classes or other widely supported and documented alternatives.
impact: Using classes from the "sun.*" packages can lead to code that is not portable or compatible across different Java platforms, potentially causing runtime failures or unexpected behavior.

checks.message: Avoid using classes from sun.* packages - use standard Java API instead
